title: run_requested, agent_described, agent_started open the trajectory back-to-back
description: Every conforming agent opens a run with the prelude trio in order and contiguously, each tagged source=avp://agent (the agent is the sole producer on the wire, per trajectory spec conformance #1): run_requested (carrying the Commission), then agent_described (the agent's self-description), then agent_started (run entry). This is structural and model-agnostic, so it runs against any real model and passes on any SDK that emits a spec-faithful prelude.

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.
